$description: Design-system layer for the Hyphal Codex instrument. This is the 'data extracted from the system' in Randy's System -> Component -> Reuse loop. Edit these and the instrument re-skins. The instrument also inlines a copy of these defaults so it runs from file:// with zero setup.

$meta.author-aesthetic: Randy Roberts (@rndyrbrts) — near-black metaball blob networks on cream, one saturated accent, mono spec labels
